name: codex-readcov
description: Codex skill for measuring transcript read coverage with codex-readcov.

interface.longDescription: Codex Readcov provides workflow guidance for using codex-readcov to inspect transcript read coverage, compare snapshot deltas, filter paths, and compose read path lists with Unix tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-readcov to inspect transcript read coverage for a Codex thread.
